title: distichlis stricta
intro: Distichlis stricta, also known as Salt Grass or Saltwort, is a perennial halophytic grass native to the coastal regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Distichlis stricta include treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation. Distichlis stricta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
